title: Create: Gas canisters
description: Create Canisters is an addon for Create: Diesel Generators. It adds canisters that let you store and transport fuels in your inventory, such as gas, oil, ethanol, and more.
body:
[Report Issue's](https://github.com/tailvpscool/CreateGasCanister), [Discord](https://discord.gg/WcxyTem8Sc) Create Canisters is an addon for Create: Diesel Generators that adds portable gas canisters 
for transporting gas fluids between tanks.

## Canisters

Three sizes are available:

- Small Gas Canister — holds 1,500 mB
- Medium Gas Canister — holds 5,000 mB  
- Large Gas Canister — holds 10,000 mB

## How to Use

Right-click any fluid tank with an empty canister to fill it, then right-click another tank 
to empty it. The canister tooltip shows what fluid it contains and how much.

Works with any fluid-compatible tank, including Create fluid pipes and all 
Create: Diesel Generators machines.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- NeoForge
- Create
- Create: Diesel Generators
